prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第56位持续上升至2026年第51位，创历史最佳，反映学校综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2023年曾有小语种专业位次下降6211的投档异常记录，但近年声誉整体平稳；抖音热度排名第21（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度有所升温；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋与水产学科全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，中国海洋大学相关工科专业受益；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年大幅增加，物理类考生估算约38万（较2025年26万增约46%），竞争显著加剧；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，在江苏属跨省招生，2025年物理类计划82人、2026年88人，招生规模中等偏小；无显著地域偏好数据。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16379、2026年小幅扩招（+7.3%）、软科排名持续上升、抖音热度较热、以及江苏省物理类考生总数大幅增加（约+46%）等多重因素，竞争加剧是主导方向。，叠加考生规模激增与排名上升的正向关注效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约17298名，区间16798–17798名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11212 → 15470 → 14616 → 16767 → 16379, showing an overall backward trend. In the past 3 years, the fluctuation range was 14616–16767, with a baseline of about 16379 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 75 in 2021, 88 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 88, an increase of about 7.3% compared to 2025, which is limited and has little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, a record high, reflecting the steady improvement of the university's comprehensive strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. In 2023, there was an abnormal record of a 6211 drop in ranking for minor language majors, but overall reputation has been stable in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 21st (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating increased attention for applications. Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, benefiting related engineering majors at Ocean University of China. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000 (an increase of about 46% from 260,000 in 2025), intensifying competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu, with a medium-to-small enrollment scale of 82 in 2025 and 88 in 2026. No significant regional preference data.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 16379, a small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+7.3%), continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, relatively high Douyin popularity, and a significant increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu (about +46%), intensified competition is the dominant trend. Combined with the surge in candidate numbers and the positive attention effect from the rising ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 17298, with a range of 16798–17798.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 17298, range 16798–17798. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main force (Mathematics Class, Marine Technology, Atmospheric Science, Food Science and Engineering Class, etc.), sprint for Tier 1 (Marine Science Top Talent Class, Computer Class, Electronic Information Class), and use Tier 3 as safety (Chemistry, English, Law, etc.). Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<16800) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (>17798) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1865 → 2426 → 3639 → 2654 → 2944, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2023, it dropped to 3639, then rebounded to 2654 in 2024, and fell back to 2944 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past three years is 2654–3639, with a baseline of about 2944 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 13 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 19, an increase of about 26.7% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 56th in 2021 to 51st in 2026, a historical best, reflecting the steady improvement of the university's comprehensive strength. In 2023, there was an abnormal enrollment record where the ranking of a minor language major dropped by 6211, but overall reputation has been stable in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 21st (relatively hot), indicating increased attention from applicants. Aquatic products A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines being top in the country. History Category enrollment majors are mainly literature, law, economics, and management, with low correlation to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is cautiously watched, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended and relatively hot, Foreign Languages are generally watched. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, with an estimated 140,000 History Category students (an increase of about 45% from 97,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu. In 2025, the History Category plan was 15, and in 2026 it is 19, with a small enrollment scale. No significant regional preference data.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2944, significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+26.7%), continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, relatively hot Douyin popularity, and a substantial increase in the total number of History Category students in Jiangsu Province (about +45%), the expansion and increase in students offset each other. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the surge in student numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 3465, with a range of 2965–3965.
